docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR LOANTOPIA, LLC. ASSIGNED TO SMITH, PHIL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY PALACIO, RECOVERY REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER YOUNAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $744.73 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE SMITH, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE SMITH, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00 SERVED DEC-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER $1,655.16 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $809.83 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LOANTOPIA, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNAN, CHRISTOPHER
